title: URL-param-driven LiveView: mount shell, handle_params reads
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/articles_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ArticlesLive) that is driven by URL params ?tag=elixir&sort=newest. mount/3 sets up an empty :articles stream + default :tag and :sort assigns. handle_params/3 reads the params (with defaults), loads articles from MyApp.Blog.list_articles(tag: tag, sort: sort), and streams them with reset: true. Changing the filter must be done via push_patch (not push_navigate) to stay in the same LiveView.
tier_rationale: URL-param lifecycle with stream + patch navigation. Multi-step idiom pattern.
